Bansal was able to give high no of rankers in itt jee exams only because they took very intelligent students by conducting that entrance exam and due to this many students couldn't get that education opportunities who may be due to some or other reason might couldn't have been able to perform in the entrance exam. 

Even if that student who couldn't be elected was not that intelligent he might would have got a good government college by qualifying its entrance exam like wbjee or comedk or some other exams by gaining a higher level of education at that Institute. 

It's like you're just picking up highly intelligent students and making them get good ranks. If your education and teaching quality had been really that good than you'd have been able to teach even the weakest student.

 My sister gave jee exam from patna by taking classes in resonance in patna itself.. She scored 75 percentile.. She took a drop year and went to kota and took admission in allen.

 She gave the entrance exam and she got scholarship which was not very good but just that 15% of the fees was deducted. She studied gave the jee mains exam and secured 93 percentile. She gave the advanced exam but couldn't qualify due to health issue p.s. she was having 102 fever on the exam day and it was corona first year 2020. So unfortunately she couldn't get selected for iit and due to her poor health she couldn't give other college exams. 

Seeing her jee mains results she got admission in kalinga btech cse. Her 2nd year has completed rn and she has got 9.5 percentile in 1 st and 2 nd year.. She's continuously first rank holder in college and recently she got a scholarship worth rs. 60000 from the college. 

She says that all this is due to allen. I'm not boasting here for coaching. She says she got a very high level of education there and due to that education and knowledge she's performing so good in college exams. 

Now just think had allen rejected her based on her low marks in entrance exams she'd have been not so much knowledgeable and getting all these ranks and scholarship in college. 

The process that today's institution are following of scholarship and giving admission to all is better than bansal's scheme. 

Bansal might would have given many ranks but it certainly has destroyed the future of many students by restricting them from good education

author: @gurjeetagarwal1037
text: In 2009 I studied from RKV sir. Till date I have never seen a more inspiring person in Kota. He is deep, grounded and Honest. He told us his Radio story. He used to study with a radio on his table. No electricity No TV at his home. He used to study by borrowing one bulb of light from his neighbours. And sometime in candle light only. It was so inspiring to hear his story. And his speeches were the most meaningful speeches I’ve ever heard from a faculty from Kota. He is a living Legend 🔥more Power to you sir. I wish Resonance grows back to become the top Institute of India. Although I still feel that It is the most legitimate system with great work culture. He used to sing Kishor kumar’s song to us. His voice is so good. More love to you because I share the same hobby of singing with you. Sir if you remember I was the only Hindi medium student in your 2008-09 R1 batch in J-2 building. I still remember I sung ‘toota toota ek parinda” song in your class. And I remember the 2009 Vihangam fest conducted by you.

author: @GravitasScienceAcedemy
text:
❤❤❤❤❤❤❤
Resonance Kota was truly ahead of its time. I had the privilege of studying there in 2013 for JEE preparation, and honestly, the level of content, discipline, and academic environment was unmatched. Even today, many institutes directly or indirectly follow Resonance study material and teaching approach because the depth of concepts was extraordinary.

For JEE Advanced preparation, Resonance has always been one of the greatest coaching institutes ever built. RKV Sir was one of my biggest inspirations, and I still admire his teaching vision deeply. Also, Ankush Jain Sir (Physics) was simply phenomenal — his teaching style and conceptual clarity were next level. Later he moved to Motion, but his impact on students remains unforgettable.

Many big institutes today may have bigger marketing, but the real academic foundation and authentic JEE culture of Resonance was legendary. Truly one of the BEST coaching institutes ever for IIT-JEE preparation. Respect forever for all the amazing faculty members of Resonance Kota.

PW has done what no other Big Institute could even thought of!!!..

author: @samarthjoshi9066
text:
Allen is best ( if u choose early batches), I my self was motion in class 11 and left motion in class 12 join allen 😉. Dekho har parameters dhekna hota hn. 
1. Allen ke paas no. Of teachers jayda hn i mean acche teachers, aur vo q because allen acche teachers ko acche salary deta hn with proper interview.
2. Jab me motion me the kai acche teachers beech chaper me choor kr chale gaye jayda unhe wha required sallary nhi mil rahi hogi.
3. Motion me har subject ke 1 teacher hi milega +substitute teacher 3rd class hoga vo tum shokal se judge kr saktey ho. Still.
4. Ek female botany teacher hn vo bhut tough padati hn muje to kuch samajh nhi aya unka aur ek zoology ke teacher vo chaper khatam hone ke baad uss chapter ke dought hi solve nhi ker 
Bacche backlogs kese cover krenge?? Kyuki yeha to ek subjects ka ek hi accha teacher hota hn. 
5.allen me apko options bhut milenge+ allen Plus app PR apko previous class recordings bhi melenge. 
Motion me doubt counter or teacher hasi majak krnete hn time pass krte hn. Esa lagta hn ki vo ham mar kr padate hn student's ko.
I DNT RECOMMEND MOTION, Allen is not best but better option then motion.
Note : YEE KOI LOGIC NHI HOTA KI SIRF AT LEAST APAN PR DEPEND KERTA HN , EK ACCHE TEACHER KI BHI UTNI KI IMPORTANCE HOTI HN
me kahunga ki PW bhi option hn kyuki vo purani bhi ho chuki hn. Student friendly bhi hn 
And ek raaj ki baat batau sare motion ne ACCHE teachers pw join kr liya hn like Harshit Thakuriya sir .

author: @Dharm-11
text:
बंद करो इस शिक्षा के ठेके को! मोशन, आकाश, एलन - यह महज़ पैसे की मशीन है, सरस्वती का मंदिर नहीं!

ये तथाकथित कोचिंग संस्थान, खासकर मोशन, शिक्षा की आड़ में केवल और केवल लूट का धंधा कर रहे हैं। बड़े-बड़े होर्डिंग्स, झूठे वादे और डरे हुए अभिभावकों की जेबें काटने का यह कारोबार अब बंद होना चाहिए।

बताइए, आज तक का कोई ऐसा टॉपर बताइए जो किसी बड़ी कंपनी का सीईओ बना हो? भारत का शिक्षा इतिहास गवाह है कि जेईई में टॉप करने वाले अधिकांश छात्र आईआईटी पहुँच कर 9 सीजीपीए भी हासिल नहीं कर पाते। क्योंकि वहाँ असली मेधा की परख होती है, न कि इन कोचिंग फैक्ट्रियों की रटंत और फार्मूला-बाजी की।

मोशन, आकाश, एलन - तुमने कोटा में सरस्वती माँ को बेचकर लक्ष्मी कमाने का सबसे बड़ा अड्डा बना लिया है। वहाँ लाखों-करोड़ों का सालाना कारोबार है, जो तुम जैसे शिक्षा-दलालों की भूख को दर्शाता है। बेशर्मी की हद है कि तुम कमज़ोर मानसिकता का फायदा उठाकर बच्चों और उनके परिवारों को बर्बाद कर रहे हो।

गौर कीजिए, तमिलनाडु जैसे राज्य को देखिए। वहाँ के लोग जेईई को उतनी अहमियत नहीं देते, क्योंकि उनकी सरकारी विश्वविद्यालय और इंजीनियरिंग कॉलेज इतने सशक्त हैं कि वहाँ से औसत प्लेसमेंट भी 40-50 लाख रुपये प्रति वर्ष तक पहुँच जाता है। यानी, असली शिक्षा संस्थान की मज़बूती पर टिकी है, न कि इन फैक्ट्रियों के झूठे प्रचार पर।

अगर आपमें हिम्मत है और आप आईआईटी या एनआईटी जाना चाहते हैं, तो आत्मनिर्भर बनिए। सेल्फ स्टडी कीजिए। ऑनलाइन प्लेटफॉर्म से मदद लीजिए, लेकिन मोशन, आकाश, एलन जैसे इन जमींदारी मानसिकता वाले कोचिंग संस्थानों के चंगुल में मत फँसिए। ये शिक्षा के नाम पर जो कर रहे हैं, वह धर्मसंकट से कम नहीं है।

सावधान! बचिए इन शिक्षा-दलालों से।
